deFinalized.reason: An independent Codex audit (2026-06-25) concluded NOT COMPLETE and found a P0 remote-data-loss risk (the seeded sample collection could replace the user's AnkiWeb data via full upload), plus unverified/over-claimed statuses (sync not proven by a real physical full download after fixes, .apkg import not asserted, AI Insights using placeholder values, forced-study claimed as full parity). The premature finalization (Entry 2) is REVERTED to Mode A until the repair phase succeeds and a new independent audit verifies completion.

notes: REVERTED to Mode A (initial-full-migration) on 2026-06-25 following an independent audit. lastAndroidCommitFullyPortedToIOS is null again; initialMigration/incrementalUpdate remain false. See docs/android-update-history.md Entry 3 and CLAUDE-REPAIR-REPORT.md.

Do NOT re-finalize until: the P0 sample-collection upload risk is blocked (done in repair P0), a real AnkiWeb full download + two-way + media sync succeed on a physical device, .apkg import/export round-trips, silent write failures are removed, AI Insights use real revlog metrics, forced-study is classified partial/platform-limited, expanded integration tests pass, CI is green, a new IPA is produced, and a SECOND independent audit verifies completion.
androidSourceSnapshotCommit is the Android HEAD used as the COMPLETE behavioral reference for the initial full migration; it is NOT a record of full parity.
The customized Android fork (BotAmbush/Anki-Android-AI) is the behavioral source of truth; upstream AnkiDroid reaches iOS only after first merging into the fork.
ankiBackendCommit is the pinned upstream anki Rust backend (tag 25.09.2); see docs/anki-backend-pin.md.
